Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 42 

FREE_GENERICS_AMT 

LABEL: Maximum Amount for Free Generic Drugs 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the maximum dollar amount for free generic drugs, offered by the Part D plan. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: FREE_GENERICS_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable is only available 2008–2010; it changed from 12 digits to 8 in
